# LensTemper Copilot Instructions

LensTemper is a portable skill package for structured plan/spec review.
Copilot should treat these instructions as advisory reference material.

- Full LensTemper requires `skills/` and `reviews/` together.
- Do not claim a full LensTemper review from Copilot-only guidance.
- For reference reviews, read `reviews/README.md`, the assigned lens prompt
  under `reviews/lenses/`, and `reviews/reviewer-template.md`.
- Label Copilot-produced feedback as advisory/reference unless an external host
  provides fresh reviewer isolation and validates LensTemper artifacts.
